label: Calls Scheduled (by call date)
definition: Pure pre-cancellation count of calls on the closer calendar — every EOD entry in period except those marked rescheduled. Deduped on lead_id+call_date.
differs_from: marketing.leads_booked::Marketing > Leads Booked counts leads.booked=true bucketed by typeform_submitted_at (signup date). This counts EOD entries by call_date (when the call is FOR). Different stage, different timestamp column.
weakness: Requires closer to submit an EOD entry for every scheduled call. Calls scheduled for future dates within the period only count once the EOD is submitted post-call.
notes: Was 'Scheduled' — renamed 2026-05-19 to make stage difference unmistakable.

label: Cancelled
definition: EOD entries with status=cancelled in period.
weakness: Marked by closer at EOD-fill time.

label: No-Shows
definition: EOD entries with status=no_show in period.

label: Quick DQs
definition: EOD entries with status=quick_dq in period — prospect disqualified within first few minutes.
weakness: DQ reason captured in dq_reason field.

label: Calls Taken
definition: EOD entries with status=showed — actual conversations that happened.

label: Closes
definition: Successful sales — EOD outcome=closed UNION payment-confirmed leads (deduplicated by lead_id). Payment SoT bridges the gap when a follow-up close was paid but no EOD was submitted.
weakness: Includes follow-up closes from Fanbasis/Stripe payment-confirmed leads even if no EOD was filed.

label: Cash Collected
definition: Sum of revenue from EOD-closed calls + payment-confirmed leads. Live Stripe API not the stripe_payments backfill table.
weakness: Per CLAUDE.md §Sales-data §4: LB90 product excluded by description regex (not metadata.altId — altId is shared across all GHL products).

label: Cash Contracted
definition: Sum of contracted value (full deal size pre-payment-plan) from EOD-closed calls + payment-confirmed leads.
weakness: Per CLAUDE.md §Sales-data §3: totalCashContracted is a non-number — never compute or show it. Use this contracted field only.

label: Net Show Rate
definition: Calls taken divided by callable (scheduled minus cancelled).
weakness: Cancellations reduce denominator — high cancel volume can artificially inflate net show rate.

label: Close Rate
definition: Closes divided by calls taken. Includes follow-up closes from payment confirmation.

label: Per-Closer Breakdown
definition: Scheduled / showed / closes / close_rate / cash / contracted grouped by closer_name. Sorted by closes desc then cash desc.
weakness: Closer-name string-matched — variants (case, spacing) split rows. normalizeCloserName() handles space/apostrophe in payment-confirmed merge.

label: Yesterday Snapshot
definition: Yesterday's scheduled / taken / cash — surfaces day-over-day movement on the cockpit header.

label: Last Month Card
definition: Prior-period actuals — scheduled / taken / cash / contracted / nsr / cr. Comparison toggle on pacing rows.

label: 3-Month Avg Card
definition: Trailing 3-month average of scheduled / taken / cash / contracted / rates.
weakness: If a month has zero data (e.g. team change) average is biased.

label: Missing EOD Alerts
definition: Closes from payment confirmation that have NO matching EOD entry — flags closers who closed but forgot to file EOD.
filter: closed=true AND no matching EOD lead_id
